pages.title: Date pickers and scheduling
pages.summary: DateInput for single dates, DateRangePicker for ranges — calendar UI with optional time selection.

pages.title: Context menus and dropdown actions
pages.summary: Right-click ContextMenu and click Dropdown patterns for contextual actions without cluttering the UI.

pages.title: Tooltips and hover cards
pages.summary: Tooltip for inline hints; HoverCard for rich previews on hover — keep discoverability without modal noise.

pages.title: Tags, chips, and multi-value inputs
pages.summary: TagInput, Chip, Tag, and Checkbox patterns for filters, labels, and multi-select form fields.
